text:
I don't understand the path forward for Mythos releases. Google & OpenAI will have equivalent models, and they are approaching AI cyber risk guardrails differently, so they will presumably just release their versions.

How does Anthropic get out of the government approval path?

A Claude Code agent deleted 717 GB of a guy's Windows install with one backslash.

The command was supposed to remove a project folder. But the escape character collapsed across four different shell parsers.

What cmd actually received: rd /S /Q \

A single backslash. Root of C:. https://t.co/kTTaABDYh2

Full story and post-mortem here:

https://t.co/a5q8gQWDUf

Open Design 0.7.0版本正式发布🚀，这回AI终于能记住你了，再也不用每次开新对话都要重新讲一遍品牌调性、用户画像、设计约束了

还有个很爽的东西：HTML-in-Canvas

以前画 storyboard 给老板看，最尴尬的就是说 "这里假装能点击"。
现在直接把可交互 HTML 嵌进 canvas 模板，端到端真渲染。

RT @yetone: 我们发布 Yansu App 之后，可能有人会觉得，这不就是另一个 AI Agent/ChatBot 吗？我为什么要改变我的使用习惯从别的 Agent 切换到 Yansu 呢？

针对这个问题，我们特地推出了 Yansu Skill。这就意味着安装这个…
RT @seclink: 问问大家：如果有一个AI 平台（封测阶段），让你连续用它一周，然后填写一份调查问卷，你就能拿到170元，周结打款到你银行卡。你会接受这种任务吗？
RT @icreatelife: Absolutely surreal to see my art at Times Square in New York https://t.co/JuxjZEgLgq
True

RT @Khazix0918: 半年前，我写了10个创作心法，没想到大家反响都特别好。

而这段时间，我给内部写的内容方法论也更新到了2.0。再加上最近我们有新的小伙伴入职，为了帮大家更好地做内容，所以决定给大家做个内部分享。
想了下，也把总结的部分发在这里，希望能对大家有帮助…

RT @bkingfilm: 一个游戏项目最危险的时候，可能不是没人看好，而是突然被公司重视。

3个人做 demo，3个月搭起来，效果不错，老板问：一个月一个英雄要多少人？

团队从几十人快速冲到七八十人，资源来了，管理也来了。

但制作人管理经验却跟不上，还没空去盯产品了…

要做好字幕 SRT，断句最重要，其次是纠正拼写错误。这些可以借助 AI 或者 Agent 来做了。

不过前提是先生成单词级别的时间戳，这样才能在组合后拼回去，现在主流语音识别模型都支持输出 json 格式，每个单词都标注清楚start和end的timestamp。

The UK’s state AI Security iIstitute findings:
1) Mythos is a big gain in cyber capabilities. But so is GPT-5.5
2) It is hard to establish an upper bound on Mythos/GPT-5.5, which appear to be limited by tokens used, rather than ability.
3) Capability doubling time is 4.5 months https://t.co/k9bPGiAUwt

All of this aligns with METR’s results as well. 

Report: https://t.co/LRbpe6yNAR

Really curious when Gemini is going to join the Cowork & Codex race to build a local app that isn’t just for developers. Antigravity hasn’t posted updates to X in a month, and remains very software focused. Meanwhile we see accelerated updates and releases from OpenAI & Anthropic
There is near insatiable demand for AI customer support that actually works
Anyone have cleaners in SF they recommend?

Last month Salesforce announced it would open its APIs and launch a headless product, essentially betting that in an agentic world, its value lies in the data layer, not the UI.

The announcement is a useful prompt for a more interesting question: if you strip away the UI and https://t.co/QStjdw17Lj
RT @icreatelife: Everyone drop something green  🌿 https://t.co/NiDh399EfX

How absolutely stunning is this! 
I love all your Green submissions! 
Shall we collaborate on a green AI video?

I've been quietly helping build this AI storyboarding tool - Firefly Boards - for 2 years. Now I'm using it to animate my first pilot episode.

Making it as a part of my friend's @Framer_X animation course. Then going to make my own about my life.

What about you? https://t.co/lM5udPgQB1
Testing new Firefly Video Editor (beta) and it's pretty great that Adobe is working on an AI-first video editor. You can generate videos and sound effects right there. https://t.co/eCmVEiFLul
QT your portrait https://t.co/ik3TC3zkKS

I can't stop laughing 😅😅😅Here's a funny prompt for you to boost your humpday mood! 

I'd love to see your experiments to laugh together😅

prompt: Turn this photo into a funny ugly doodle drawing. Make it look like: a quick sketch using a cheap marker or crayon messy, rough, https://t.co/Dj7MosER3O
